sentences.arabic: تَمْتَلِئُ المُدُنُ العَرَبِيَّةُ القَدِيمَةُ بِالأَسْوَاقِ الشَّعْبِيَّةِ المَشْهُورَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stari arapski gradovi puni su poznatih narodnih pijaca.
sentences.translationEn: Old Arab cities are full of famous traditional markets (souks).

sentences.arabic: يَشْتَرِي النَّاسُ مِنَ السُّوقِ التَّوَابِلَ، وَالعُطُورَ، وَالسَّجَادَ اليَدَوِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi na pijaci kupuju začine, parfeme i ručno rađene tepihe.
sentences.translationEn: People buy spices, perfumes, and handmade carpets from the market.

sentences.arabic: تَفُوحُ رَائِحَةُ البَخُورِ فِي كُلِّ زَاوِيَةٍ مِنَ المَكَانِ.
sentences.translation: Miris tamjana širi se svakim uglom mjesta.
sentences.translationEn: The scent of incense wafts through every corner of the place.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ السُّيَّاحُ التَّجَوُّلَ فِي هَذِهِ الأَسْوَاقِ لِشِرَاءِ الهَدَايَا التَّذْكَارِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Turisti vole šetati ovim pijacama kako bi kupili suvenire.
sentences.translationEn: Tourists love wandering through these markets to buy souvenirs.

sentences.arabic: تَعْكِسُ هَذِهِ الأَسْوَاقُ تَارِيخَ المَدِينَةِ وَحَيَاةَ النَّاسِ اليَوْمِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Ove pijace oslikavaju historiju grada i svakodnevni život ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: These markets reflect the city's history and the daily life of the people.
